summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Phonic AI Interview Agent MVP. All 13 backend API tests pass. All major frontend flows work: login, dashboard, navigation, new interview creation, interview detail page, interviews list, JD Library, Settings. Theme toggle works.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigating to /interview/:sessionId in a fresh session redirects to Login page because api.js likely has a 401 interceptor that redirects. The route is defined as public (no ProtectedRoute) but the API call inside the component fails without auth token, causing redirect. When navigated while logged in, the page loads and shows 'Connection Error - Unable to connect to interview server' (expected - Deepgram not configured).
Stat cards are visible and working but do not have data-testid='stat-card' attribute for automated testing

issues: Dark theme looks good with proper contrast. Light theme also works correctly after toggle.

action_items: Consider making /interview/:sessionId page work without full auth redirect - candidate should be able to join via direct link. Currently redirects to login if not authenticated.
Add data-testid='stat-card' to dashboard stat cards for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: InterviewRoom.js (line 49): Uses api.get() which requires JWT auth - but the route is intended to be public for candidates. The api.js interceptor likely redirects 401 to login. Consider using unauthenticated fetch or a separate public API endpoint for session details.

InterviewsList.js View button: The playwright test found that a:has-text('View') selected the wrong element. Verify that 'View' links in the interview table have correct hrefs to /dashboard/interviews/:sessionId
Voice pipeline shows 'Connection Error' on interview room - expected since Deepgram/Cartesia keys not configured, but the UX could be improved with clearer messaging about text mode fallback

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all major flows working, minor issue with interview room public access)

seed_data_creation: Created 3 interview sessions (TEST_John Doe, TEST_Jane Smith, UI Test Candidate) and 1 JD template (TEST_Software Engineer) via API tests and UI tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and passing. Frontend flows all working. The main concern is /interview/:sessionId route requiring auth when it should be public for candidates. Backend URL: https://interview-agent-mvp.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth: admin@phonic.ai / phonic123.
rca_of_issues: InterviewRoom auth issue: The /interview/:token route is defined outside ProtectedRoute in App.js, but the InterviewRoom component calls api.get('/api/interviews/{sessionId}') using the shared api.js axios instance. The api.js likely has a response interceptor that redirects to /login on 401 responses. Since a candidate without a JWT token will get 401, they get redirected to login instead of seeing the interview room. Fix: Either add a public endpoint for session info lookup, or pass session data via URL params, or remove the 401 redirect interceptor from api.js for public routes.
